regional_cost_note: Heat pump installers in Invercargill typically charge $2,600–$4,800 for a single-room unit (supply and install) and $8,500–$20,000 for a multi-split system. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Get at least 3 quotes — brand, capacity, and installation complexity vary widely and significantly affect the price.
